questions.question:
A workload security diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `securitycontext-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `securitycontext-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `secure-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment secure-api -n securitycontext-lab -o wide`
- `runAsUserCheck` is `kubectl get deployment secure-api -n securitycontext-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.securityContext.runAsUser}'`
- `fsGroupCheck` is `kubectl get deployment secure-api -n securitycontext-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.securityContext.fsGroup}'`
- `seccompCheck` is `kubectl get deployment secure-api -n securitycontext-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].securityContext.seccompProfile.type}'`
- `allowPrivilegeEscalationCheck` is `kubectl get deployment secure-api -n securitycontext-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].securityContext.allowPrivilegeEscalation}'`
- `capabilitiesDropCheck` is `kubectl get deployment secure-api -n securitycontext-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].securityContext.capabilities.drop[0]}'`
- `mountPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment secure-api -n securitycontext-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].mountPath}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n securitycontext-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm runAsUser, fsGroup, seccomp, capability drop, and mount path before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1701/securitycontext-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1701/securitycontext-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Security Context Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not restart the Deployment, do not delete pods, and do not patch the live securityContext fields during this drill.

verification.description: The security diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, securityContext inspection commands, event check, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact deployment inventory, securityContext checks, and safe manifest review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe securityContext remediation guidance is removed
